name: cold_day_occupancy_away
description: Cold day. User starts home with heat running at comfort_heat=70F. At 09:00 user leaves (occupancy_away) — setback applies to setback_heat=60F (NOT setback_cool). Classification cycles at 11:00 and 13:00 while away (reapply heat setback). User returns at 17:00 (occupancy_home) → comfort restored to 70F.
notes: Tests cold day + full occupancy cycle: home → away (heat setback) → classification cycles during away → home (comfort restored).
Key assertion: away setback selects setback_HEAT (not setback_cool) when day type is cold/heat.
Simulator _handle_occupancy_away() checks classification.hvac_mode: heat → setback_heat; cool → setback_cool.
Classification cycles while occupancy=away produce setback_applied (not classification_applied) — simulator re-applies setback via _handle_occupancy_away() called from _handle_classification().
All assertions are fully logic-track — no gap closures required.
This is a gap-filling scenario: covers cold-day away occupancy path that has zero existing golden coverage.

events.note: Cold winter morning. Indoor at comfort_heat=70F. User home.
User leaves. Occupancy transitions to 'away'. Heat setback fires: setback_heat=60F (cold day, heat mode).
30-min classification cycle while away. Occupancy=away → simulator calls _handle_occupancy_away() → reapplies setback_heat=60F.
Another classification cycle while away. Same result: setback_heat maintained at 60F.
User returns home. Occupancy transitions to 'home'. Comfort restored to comfort_heat=70F.

assertions.reason: Cold-day classification applied while home: hvac_mode=heat, target=comfort_heat=70F.
User leaves → occupancy_away. Classification is cold/heat → setback_heat=60F applied (NOT setback_cool). This is the key assertion distinguishing cold-day away from warm-day away.
Classification cycle while away. Simulator _handle_classification() detects occupancy=away and calls _handle_occupancy_away() which reapplies setback_heat=60F.
Second classification cycle while away. Setback_heat=60F maintained — not reverted to comfort.
User returns home → occupancy_home. Classification is heat mode → restore to comfort_heat=70F.

verdict.summary: Cold day away setback selects setback_heat; classification cycles maintain setback; comfort restored on return
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (heat, 70F) → setback_applied (60F, away) → setback_applied (60F, classification cycles x2) → comfort_restored (70F, home)
verdict.expected_behavior: Away setback on cold day uses setback_heat=60F (not setback_cool); classification cycles during away maintain setback; home return restores comfort_heat
